## Community Reminder! :c_goosebonk:  
A reminder that we here in Eden are a community server first and foremost. We are not Grindr or a Grindr replacement. We are not a hook up or dating site. Selfies, Selfies comments, Gym, Twilight Lounge, and any of the other SFW areas should be kept SFW. They are not the place for getting horny and thirsty. Our members should be able to share their lives, normal selfies, make genuine friends, and not feel looked at like meat at a butcher shop all the time! # New channels, currency shop, level perks @Verified 
* new #☕・deep-dive-forum channel (trial). Share your story, current progress, or seek advice. All members who post from today until 1/12 will receive 1000 EC (Eden Credits) as a grand opening bonus :NM_peepoMoney:

* :p_lookie:  New level perks available: https://discord.com/channels/1278253523619807233/1278433894823104643/1318736551986991295
* As mentioned above, we will now make the currency system more official here (Eden Credits) and will give it out during events and such. You can also claim them in #🤖・bot-center using /daily and other activities. Check balance with /balance. You get credits by chatting & VC as well. You can use them to purchase exclusive roles, OR reach Level 50 to unlock our Sacred Well channel with free access to some of them. A more official rollout will be announced later.

# @Verified for more information 
Just to give exposure, I have attached:
* a screenshot of a common scam that is happening at the moment (the one with a black screen and white letters)
*  a screenshot of how to fix your account back if it is compromised (the one with a white screen and black letters).

# Hack Alert @everyone @Verified 
If you got a message like this, please DO NOT click on it. 
* Also we strongly advise you to set up 2 Factor Authorization and get a passkey to your account to protect against hackers. They can sometimes hack without any interaction.

It's also a hack attempt if they tell you something about your Discord account being reported and ask you to login to a link and talk to support team.

# ✨  @Verified MEGA UPDATE! ✨ 

## ☕️ REAL TALK FORUM
* For more serious and in-depth talks or longer stories & posts - head to #☕・deep-dive-forum! Upgraded from Coming Out Stories, it now contains more *diverse* topics.

## 🐉 MYTHICAL ROLES
* Mythical roles are **back** in the shop using Eden Credits. Use **/buy** 
* Start saving your credits for some upcoming events too! 

## ⭐ SERVER FEEDBACK SURVEY
* Take our anonymous server survey! We want to learn about your experience!
* https://dyno.gg/form/bcd0ad0d
* Optionally, disclose who you are so we can gift you 3000 credits.

# 💚 MAINTENANCE & IMPORTANT UPDATES! 💚

## 🕊️ HIATUS ROLE / LEVEL RESET
* We have a @HIATUS role you may request by opening, a #🚀・support-ticket it will remove visibility from all channels. Please ask for Hiatus if you need a break, instead of leaving the server! 
* Starting from this announcement, levels & Eden Credits will **reset** upon leaving the server. This is for fairness and also to safeguard against NSFW access abuse.
* The exception will be for HACKED accounts. We will re-transfer your levels and credits from your old account.

## 🎟️ SUPPORT TICKETS!
* Please remember to make a #🚀・support-ticket if you have an issue to report! 
* Avoid DMing individual staff unless it pertains to another staff member. 
* Issues **cannot be addressed** if it is not in a ticket! Don't let issues *intensify*!
* Support tickets are only visible to staff members.

## 🫧 BUBBLE GENERATORS
* Bubble VCs are made to take a quiet moment from the main VCs, for individuals who are uncomfortable in big groups, or for self-made events.
* Bubble VCs are still meant to be **inclusive**. If you **only** want certain people in your VC, make private discord calls.
 
## 💥 NEW RANGERS!
* Please welcome @jojo ✰, @Qyupid 💘, @N A T to the team! We're so excited to have them!

@Verified I bear very sad news. 📰 You may be wondering why Bro Adam hasn't responded and I'm afraid we just got word. He had taken his vacation leave with his husband Steve and they went to Hawaii. Adam was sunbathing on the sand when suddenly he noticed Steve crying out for help. A shark had attacked! Without hesitation, Adam dived straight in to pull Steve out and fight the shark. Luckily, Steve escaped and swam away, but Adam was taken under by the other sharks that came. He lost his life, a hero.

We are hosting a memorial for him in #🔮・genius-bar bar so come by and drop some candles. We will always cherish our memories with him, countless hours of laughing, learning, being a menace to him. Please send thoughts and prayers.

## GO GAYS!

Hey @Verified,

I wanted to share something important on behalf of a member of our community. @EJ, The Supreme is currently facing a significant financial hurdle in his pursuit of higher education. Many of you know @EJ, The Supreme as a valued member here. He's trying to get back on track with their Bachelor's in Legal Studies after withdrawing from college last year due to severe symptoms of Ulcerative Colitis. While their health has significantly improved with new medication, he's been told they must pay all the fees and tuition in the amount of $3000 before they are allowed to re-enroll.  This is a really tough situation, and he's started a GoFundMe to help cover these costs so they can continue their education and get their life back on track. You don't have to give money to help; even sharing helps tremendously. If you're able to help out, even a small amount would make a difference. Every bit of support is incredibly appreciated.

You can learn more and donate here: https://gofund.me/655a0ae5

Thank you for taking the time to read this and for supporting a fellow community member.

## Discord Image Embed Problem Fix :check: ( DO IT NOW)
@Unverified @Verified 
If you notice that you're having issues on mobile where image & gif embeds are not loading, you can do this fix: 

* Go to Discord app settings, do Delete Cache at the bottom
* Log out and delete the app
* Install any phone updates, restart the phone
* Re-install Discord. Should work after that.

@Unverified **please do this so you can see the image instructions load in tickets.**

Share this along to anyone else experiencing the issue. :p_cheer:

# :New_icon1::New_icon:  #🛌・.ıl Deep Talks lı. [voice] Voice Channel! :Sparklies: 

## The #🛌・.ıl Deep Talks lı. [voice] is a space to respectfully discuss heavier topics that may not be appropriate to discuss in a general VC.
### These topics include:
- Politics & controversial current events
- Real-life issues (jobs, relationships, family, finances)
- Mental health struggles
- Sharing personal experiences/stories that may involve trauma ***(not trauma-dumping)*** or any of the topics above
Think of it as #☕・deep-dive-forum but a VC version! :b_atiffany: 

### **Why tho?** :huh: 
We want to continue fostering a community were everyone feels welcomed and comfortable. We've noticed that VCs have a tendency to get dominated by heavy topics, resulting in others feeling uncomfortable or excluded. We made the #🛌・.ıl Deep Talks lı. [voice] to redirect those conversations out of the common areas into a dedicated space.
*If Jimmy came to the Game Studio for good vibes and gaming, he wouldn't like if Johnny and Jacob came in and started debating about politics...*

### **PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE** :b_asabrina: 
- Do consistent :Sparklies: vibe checks :Sparklies: and move VCs when necessary *(read the room y'all)* :b_awendy: 
- Utilize #🫧・.ıl Bubble VC Generator lı. [voice] (LV 5+) if you don't want to use #🛌・.ıl Deep Talks lı. [voice] 
- __DO NOT__ use this as a trauma dumping space
- Adhere to our **community etiquette** guidelines: https://discord.com/channels/1278253523619807233/1278433894823104643/1318736497498783835
@Verified

# @Verified !!! LISTEN UP TO LET ALL THIS DIES AND REMAINS DEAD HERE
To start off, the recent updates to the server ARE NOT NEWWWWW. The server has had rules since the moment it was created. When everyone joins the server it is explicitly stated that political discussions should be discussed in the appropriate channels. This isn’t something that is brand new information or changed because 1 person said something…. You all are telling us to have “thick skin” or “to not be so sensitive” yet all I’m seeing is multiple people complain and be sensitive about something that has been a rule SINCE THE SERVER WAS MADE. 

We wanted this server to be a space for people to escape reality for a moment and forget their current situation, a place to find a sense of belonging and a social network, and a place to discuss current events and debate about them. This is why we tried our best to create channels to discuss designated topics that align with different interests and discussions. 

Now, on the topic at hand, we have recognized that discussions about politics are more thought- and emotion-invoking, so we created spaces for them and developed solutions like #☕・deep-dive-forum and #🌎・current-events. This is NOT new and has been here since the server was created. At this point all we are seeing is just straight up name calling and bullying. We are all adults here so let’s act like it. This topic dies here. 

As a reminder that server rules must be followed as always. If you have complaints then make a ticket and let us know because your opinions do matter (just realize what is you are complaining about and don’t be so disrespectful about…). 

No more singling people out, No more bringing up “changes” when there hasn’t been any, AND NO MORE BULLYING OTHERS INTO SUBMISSION. We are ALL friends here so start being kind and respectful to others and let the staff deal with server problems. Thank you and goodnight/morning!

messages.content:
# IMPORTANT: Health & Safety Reminders :e_alove5: :e_alove4: :e_alove3:
## __Reporting Concerns & Harassment__ :p_cop: 
We are here to support **__YOU__** and make Bro Eden a safe space for all, but this is also a **community effort**!
### If anyone is making you uncomfortable or you witness rules being broken in DMs, public spaces, or VCs, **__please__ make a #🚀・support-ticket so we can help**! :p_lovee: 
-# **WE CANNOT TAKE ACTIONS IF A TICKET IS NOT SUBMITTED AND ISSUES ARE NOT DOCUMENTED!**
- We will handle things confidentially and respectfully.
- Don't feel like you are "snitching". If everyone hesitates to speak up, issues will keep repeating. **See it, say it!**
  - The last thing we want is for you to leave the server because of someone making you uncomfortable, and not addressing it. If they're doing it to you, they're likely doing it to others as well.
## __Banned Members__ 🚫 
When members are banned from Bro Eden, it is *always* due to **probable cause** and **valid reasons**.
**If you receive DMs from a banned member**, we recommend that you do not engage. Upon someone being banned, we explicitly specify the reason, so they have no business asking *you* why they are banned.
## __HIATUS Role__ 🕊️ 
Need a break from the server? **DON'T LEAVE!** :c_catcryy: 
**Instead, submit a #🚀・support-ticket and ask for the @HIATUS role**! This will remove your access to all channels in order to give you a clean break. Whenever you're ready to come back, just let us know!
-# Members who leave have their XP/Levels reset!

-# All information here can also be found in #📖・survival-guide! @Verified

# Hacking Fyi :a_ppface: 
There's a strong rise in hacks recently across servers, mainly from people clicking on phishing links. 
FYI how the hack works: the link has a strong trojan that automatically gets your IP, infiltrates your password, and automatically logs into your account and mass-spams all your friends & server channels. This is all via a bot mass network, and the hacker doesn't even have to lift a finger to personally touch your account. It's completely automated.
:a_akamalurkey: Don't click random links or random NSFW server invites from randos
:a_akamalurkey: Set 2FA on your account (guarantee block against the hack bot)
